dateline: Johnson Space Center, Houston / Kennedy Space Center — 2017–Present
heroHeadline: Artemis III SLS Core Stage Rolls Out at Michoud; ML-1 Arrives at VAB for Artemis III Prep
heroSubtitle: Apr 20: NASA rolled out the 'top four-fifths' of the Artemis III SLS core stage at Michoud Assembly Facility in New Orleans, a key manufacturing milestone for the 2027 launch campaign. ML-1 arrived at KSC's VAB on Apr 17 and begins inspections ahead of Artemis III stacking operations. Orion 30-day heat shield inspection ongoing at KSC.
footerNote: Data sourced from NASA.gov, OIG Reports, SpaceNews, Ars Technica, Congressional appropriations. Tier 1: NASA/ESA/Official. Tier 2: SpaceNews/Ars Technica/Reuters. Tier 3: Planetary Society/AIAA.
